items.content_html: A utility for Obsidian plugin developers to seamlessly synchronize plugins from the project development directory with Obsidian vaults. This Bash script utilizes rsync and fswatch to automatically synchronize changes, enabling real-time testing and development across devices. Supports macOS and iCloud integration for mobile testing.
items.title: bulletinmybeard/obsidian-plugin-dev-sync: A utility for Obsidian plugin developers to seamlessly synchronize plugins from the project development directory with Obsidian vaults. This Bash script utilizes rsync and fswatch to automatically synchronize changes, enabling real-time testing and development across devices. Supports macOS and iCloud integration for mobile testing.
